Meeting notes — 2026-07-17
==========================

Topics discussed:
- OmniCLI Phase 1 rollout timeline
- CVE-2026-1234 patching schedule
- Backup verification procedures

Action items:
- Run omni backup verify --name daily after each deployment
- Check omni search index --rebuild on new machines
- Review omni file duplicate --scan ~/projects weekly

Next meeting: 2026-07-24
